EXAMPLE RSVP/INTRO EMAIL:



Hello NAME,  



We could not be more excited for you to join us here in CITY NAME for the MONTH Two-Day EVENT NAME!!! 

 

PLEASE REMEMBER to RSVP by emailing EMAIL ADDRESS HERE and indicating if it will just be you attending, your partner (if applicable), any serious food allergies/restrictions. As of today, we are 32% full at seating capacity and we would hate for you to miss out on the opportunity to attend EVENT NAME! 

This will be hosted at LOCATION on DAYS, TIME DATE! 

 

LOCATION:



ADDRESS

 

Saturday, February 9th, 2019

         Check-in: 8:00am-8:30am

Training: 8:30am-5:30pm (Lunch & Snacks provided)

 

Sunday, February 10th, 2019

Training: 8:30am-5:30pm (Lunch & Snacks provided)

 

Please note that we not be providing breakfast either of these mornings, be make sure to bring any necessary items or prepare before arrival.



Hotel Accommodations:  This hotel is about a 15 minute walk from LOCATION or a 5 minute drive. 



HYATT PLACE SCOTTSDALE/OLD TOWN

7300 East Third Avenue Scottsdale, Arizona, USA, 85251

1.     Follow this LINK!!! 

2.     Choose the dates you would like for your stay (corporate rates are available between DATES.

3.     The corporate code should populate as G-DFEB

4.     Follow the instructions to check out  

If you are trying to book nights other than the rates indicated you will just need to contact the hotel directly - 888 HYATT HP (888-492-8847) and use the code G-DFEB

If you would like to look elsewhere below are a few recommendations in the area.  

 ·      Best Western – 7320 E Camelback Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85251https://www.bestwestern.com/en_US/book/hotel-details.03147.html?iata=00171880&ssob=BLBWI0004G&cid=BLBWI0004G:google:gmb:03147

·      Courtyard Marriot- Scottsdale Old Town – 3311 North Scottsdale Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85251

http://www.marriott.com/hotels/travel/phxsc-courtyard-scottsdale-old-town/?scid=bb1a189a-fec3-4d19-a255-54ba596febe2

 

The closest airport to the event location will be Phoenix Sky Harbor (PHX). This is about a 20 minute drive from the hotel where the EVENT will take place. For transportation there are many options available to you including car rental, taxi, as well as Uber and Lyft that are very popular in the Phoenix area! 



Please note that DG Enterprises will not be covering the costs of any of the fees related to your participation in the event. Costs related to travel, accommodation, transportation and some meals will be your responsibility. You're tickets include an invitation to attend this amazing event and the details outlined in the above timeline! Please make arrangements for such and if you have any questions please let us know.

 

Don’t Forget to RSVP by emailing EMAIL ADDRESS HERE :)

 

MORE helpful details: 

What is the Weather in Scottsdale?

Where Do I Check In? 

Who will I see at the Event?

What Restaurants do you Recommend? 

What Fun Things Are There to do in Scottsdale? 



Looking forward to meeting you then! Let me know if there is anything else I can help with!

Hey NAME, we sent you a really important email about the EVENT NAME! Be sure to check it out ASAP! :)
